reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the drama based on the life of Rocky Graziano.
2. Using that film, determine which man won an Academy Award for his work on it.
original_final_question: What man won an Academy Award for his work on a drama based on the life of Rocky Graziano? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which 1956 drama film was based on the life of Rocky Graziano? Evidence: Somebody Up There Likes Me (1956 film): Somebody Up There Likes Me is a 1956 American drama film based on the life of middleweight boxing legend Rocky Graziano. -> Somebody Up There Likes Me

Node 2: Who won Academy Awards including one for "Somebody Up There Likes Me"? Evidence: F. Keogh Gleason: Francis Keogh Gleason (April 14, 1906 – December 18, 1982) was a resident set decorator at MGM studios for over 40 years. In that time he won 4 Academy Awards (for "An American in Paris" in 1951, "The Bad and the Beautiful" in 1952, "Somebody Up There Likes Me" in 1956 and "Gigi" in 1958) and was nominated an additional 3 times. -> Francis Keogh Gleason
